title: Solving the Towers of Hanoi Puzzle
scenario: Generate a recursive function to solve the classic Tower of Hanoi puzzle. The function should take the number of disks and the source, target, and auxiliary rods as input parameters. The function should return a step-by-step solution, displaying each move as a disk is transferred from one rod to another. Ensure the solution is optimized for the minimum number of moves.
constraints: Must include comments explaining the logic and algorithm used
Must use a stack data structure to keep track of the moves

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the function correctly solve the Towers of Hanoi puzzle?
Is the code well-structured, concise, and clear?
Are the comments informative and helpful in understanding the code?
Is a stack data structure used to keep track of the moves?
